booking_service_name.description: The booking service providing the booking reservation.

reservation_id.description: The identifier of the booking reservation from the booking service.

service_provider_name.description: The name of the service provider (e.g. Hotel) the reservation refers to

location.description: The location or place the reservation refers to (e.g. city, service provider place, etc.)

check_in_date.description: The check-in date for the reservation.

check_out_date.description: The check-out date for the reservation.

guests.description: The guest of the reservation (num of adults, num of children, etc).

car_rental.description: Indicates inclusion of car rental in the reservation.

num_of_rooms.description: The number of rooms the reservation refers to.

family_name.description: Current last name(s) or surname(s) of the holder.

given_name.description: Current first name(s), including middle name(s), of the holder.

birth_date.description: Day, month, and year on which the holder was born.
